genres.name: Science Fiction
genres.tagline: Worlds a little ahead of ours

books.title: The Silent Library
books.author: Maya Greene
books.blurb: A reclusive archivist discovers a book that should not exist.

books.title: The Silent Library
books.author: Maya Greene
books.blurb: The collector's hardcover edition. Same story as PT-1001, sturdier binding.

books.title: Northbound
books.author: Ezra Vance
books.blurb: Two strangers share a long winter drive and a longer secret.

books.title: Whispers in the Fog
books.author: Dahlia Crane
books.blurb: A seaside town, a missing lighthouse keeper, and one stubborn detective.

books.title: The Last Alibi
books.author: Roman Hart
books.blurb: Every witness is lying. The trick is figuring out about what.

books.title: Whispers in the Fog
books.author: Dahlia Crane
books.blurb: The large-print edition. Same title as PT-2001, easier on the eyes.

books.title: Quantum Drift
books.author: Dr. Iris Cho
books.blurb: A physicist wakes up one second before the universe forgets her.

books.title: The Mars Accord
books.author: Leon Pike
books.blurb: Diplomacy is hard. Diplomacy at light-speed delay is harder.

books.title: Echoes of Andromeda
books.author: Nova Reyes
books.blurb: A generation ship hears a reply it was never meant to receive.

books.title: The Sleepy Dragon
books.author: Patty Bloom
books.blurb: A bedtime story for the dragon who simply will not yawn.

books.title: Counting Stars
books.author: Sam Willow
books.blurb: Count from one sleepy owl to ten twinkling stars.

books.title: Weeknight Wonders
books.author: Nina Ortiz
books.blurb: Sixty dinners, none of them longer than thirty minutes.

books.title: The Sourdough Almanac
books.author: Bram Fields
books.blurb: A year of bread, one stubborn starter at a time.

books.title: One Pot, Many Meals
books.author: Nina Ortiz
books.blurb: Less washing up, more eating. A whole shelf of one-pot dinners.
